title: Marico's acquired brands generate ₹2,375 crore in FY26
description: Detailed subsidiary financials show Marico's acquired portfolio has reached meaningful scale, led by strong growth at Plix and Cosmix, even as profitability remains uneven across brands.

title: Functional & Innovative Foods files DRHP with Sebi for IPO
description: Functional & Innovative Foods has filed its DRHP with Sebi for an IPO comprising a fresh issue of 60 lakh shares and an offer for sale of 25 lakh shares. The company plans to use the proceeds for capacity expansion, debt repayment, subsidiary investment, work…

title: Health-F&B brand Yummy Bee details multi-city expansion and funding plans
description: At that point, we will launch our Series B round to fund expansion into Mumbai, Delhi, Pune, and Chennai, scaling the brand to a 250-crore mark over the next 3 years.

title: India at cusp of 'snacking renaissance'; L Catterton bets on healthy snacking, branded foods
description: Expressing enthusiasm for India's rising consumption trends, L Catterton zeroes in on the healthy snacking and branded foods market. Having launched its first fund dedicated to India, the firm has made three key investments lately. Executive Chairman Sanjiv M…

title: Crax maker DFM Foods up for grabs as Advent scouts buyers
description: Advent International is negotiating to sell its majority stake in DFM Foods. Several consumer goods companies and private equity firms are in talks for this acquisition. The deal is expected to be finalized by December, according to executives. DFM Foods, mak…
